entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving agricultural productivity and practices.

entities.name: RESOURCE AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The presence and accessibility of natural resources like water and land.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL OUTCOMES
entities.description: The health results related to dietary intake and nutrition.

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A critical natural resource impacting agricultural productivity.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total money earned by a household from various sources.

entities.name: FOOD CONSUMPTION PATTERNS
entities.description: The habits and types of food consumed by households.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Materials or substances occurring in nature which can be exploited for economic gain.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: The methods used by farmers to cultivate crops and manage livestock.

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIAN LANDSCAPE
entities.description: A specific ecological region in South Asia.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region containing the Central Indian Landscape.

entities.name: PRIMARY SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method involving direct interaction with 1,403 households.

entities.name: ORDERED PROBIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to identify drivers influencing nutritional outcomes.

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The state of having sufficient water for irrigation, often limited in dug wells.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to land to assist in the production of crops.

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants grown for food or other purposes.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised in an agricultural setting.

entities.name: CATTLE
entities.description: Bovine animals kept as livestock.

entities.name: BUFFALO
entities.description: Bovine animals kept as livestock.

entities.name: GOATS
entities.description: Caprine animals kept as livestock.

entities.name: ENERGY INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of energy consumed through diet.

entities.name: PROTEIN INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of protein consumed through diet.

entities.name: IRON INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of iron consumed through diet.

entities.name: LANDHOLDINGS
entities.description: The amount of land owned or managed by a household.

entities.name: EDUCATION
entities.description: The level of formal schooling attained by household members.

entities.name: WELFARE PROGRAMS
entities.description: Government initiatives to provide social and financial support.

entities.name: MGNREGA
entities.description: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, a social welfare program.

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: The number of people living in a single household.

entities.name: IRRIGATED LAND
entities.description: Agricultural land that has access to irrigation systems.

entities.name: WATER RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The planned development and management of water resources.

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT AGRICULTURE PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural methods designed to withstand climate variability.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The condition of having consistent access to nutrients for a healthy life.
